name: Ria Money Transfer
description_short: Ria Money Transfer at 639 S Broadway, Los Angeles, CA 90014 in the Downtown Los Angeles neighborhood is Mon-Fri 8:00 AM – 7:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.5 stars across 30 reviews. Call +1 855-355-2141.
description_long:
Ria Money Transfer is an established international remittance provider with over 35 years of operating history in the money transfer space. The company has processed over one billion transfers and maintains a global network that spans 190+ countries and territories. Their primary service is facilitating cross-border money movements for individuals sending funds to family, friends, and other recipients internationally.

Ria offers multiple channels for sending money: online through their website, via their mobile app (iOS and Android), in-person at physical agent locations, and through WhatsApp integration for select countries. Recipients can receive funds through bank deposits, cash pickups at physical locations, digital wallets, home delivery, or ATM withdrawals. The service supports over 100 currencies and features a real-time transfer tracking system. They prominently advertise competitive exchange rates and low transfer fees, with a promotional example showing $1.99 USD fee for transfers to Mexico.

Ria distinguishes itself through its expansive agent network of 600,000+ locations worldwide, mobile-first approach with WhatsApp integration, and multi-method sending/receiving options. The company emphasizes speed (describing transfers that complete in seconds), security through their processing history, and convenience via multiple send channels. They've also developed brand presence through sponsorship partnerships, including becoming an official sponsor of the Mexican National Team. The platform maintains high user ratings across multiple platforms (4.9 stars on iOS, 4.5 on Trustpilot).

While Ria operates as a legitimate money transfer service, the actual costs, exchange rates, and delivery times vary by corridor and payment/delivery method combinations. Transfer fees may exceed the promotional rate shown depending on transaction size and destination country. The service is primarily designed for personal remittances rather than business payments, and availability of specific send/receive methods depends on the sending and receiving country combination. Regulatory compliance and limits may apply based on jurisdiction.
pros: 600,000+ payout locations across 190+ countries enables broad geographic coverage
Multiple sending options (online, app, in-person, WhatsApp) accommodate different user preferences
Multiple receive methods (bank deposit, cash pickup, digital wallet, home delivery, ATM) provide flexibility
Real-time transfer tracking allows senders to monitor transaction status
35+ year operational history with over 1 billion transfers demonstrates established track record
Support for 100+ currencies reduces need for intermediate conversions
High user ratings (4.9/5 on iOS, 4.5/5 on Trustpilot) from verified reviews
cons: Transfer fees vary by corridor and method; promotional rates may not apply to all transactions
Exchange rates are market-dependent and may not be competitive across all currency pairs
Service availability for specific send/receive method combinations depends on country regulations and partnerships
Delivery times not clearly specified on homepage—vary by method and destination
Business and high-volume transfers appear outside scope; designed primarily for personal remittances
best_for: International workers and immigrants sending regular remittances to family abroad
People making casual money transfers to friends and relatives in 190+ countries
Users who prefer mobile-first or social media-integrated transfer options like WhatsApp
Senders who value flexibility in receive methods (cash pickup, bank deposit, or digital wallet)
diagnosis: Ria Money Transfer is best for individuals and immigrants who regularly send money internationally and want flexibility in how they send (online, app, in-person, WhatsApp) and receive funds (bank, cash, digital wallet). The main caveat is that actual fees, exchange rates, and delivery times vary significantly by corridor and method combination, so users should compare costs for their specific route before committing; promotional rates advertised may not apply to all transactions.
services: In-person cash payments at agent locations
